snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="YOUR_BASE_URL",
)
client.identity.get_token(
    username="username",
    password="password",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="YOUR_BASE_URL",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.identity.get_token(
        username="username",
        password="password",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

from seed import AsyncSeedApi
